---
title: Projects
---

Here are some past an ongoing projects:

**[Strategic Interactions in Foreign Aid Games - Pousse, Pereira, Sharma (2024)](Micro2_grouppaper)** 

blablabla

**[Presentation of the Auclert, Bardóczy, Rognlie (2023) paper on "MPCs, MPEs and Multipliers: A Trilemma for New Keynesian Models"](Macro2_presentation.qmd).**

This is 

**[UG POL3226 Research Essay - Campaign Contributions and Congressional Voting Behvaviour in the US](UG_Pol3226.qmd)**
